title: fix(deps): update module github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers to v0.9.5

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>docker/docker-credential-helpers (github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers)</summary>

### [`v0.9.5`](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/releases/tag/v0.9.5)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/compare/v0.9.4...v0.9.5)

#### What's Changed

- build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 5 to 6 [#​395](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/395)
- build(deps): bump actions/upload-artifact from 4 to 6 [#​398](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/398)
- build(deps): bump softprops/action-gh-release from 2.3.3 to 2.4.1 [#​391](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/391)
- build(deps): bump softprops/action-gh-release from 2.4.1 to 2.5.0 [#​397](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/397)
- Dockerfile: remove redundant DEBIAN\_FRONTEND=noninteractive [#​404](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/404)
- Dockerfile: update golangci-lint to v2.8  [#​402](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/402)
- gha: update some actions to ubuntu 24.04 [#​401](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/401)
- update to go1.25.2 [#​392](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/392)
- update to go1.25.5 [#​399](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/pull/399)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/compare/v0.9.4...v0.9.5>

</details>
